etymology.description: иЎӨ(иЎЈ) (yД«, "clothing") + phonetic иЎҖ(иЎҖ) (xuГЁ, "blood") -> иЎӨ denotes the semantic category of clothing, while иЎҖ provides the phonetic clue -> undergarment
etymology.interpretation: The character иЈҮ(sГ№, "undergarment") combines the semantic component for clothing иЎӨ(иЎЈ) (yД«, "clothing") with the phonetic element иЎҖ(иЎҖ) (xuГЁ, "blood") to form a character meaning undergarment. The use of the иЎҖ component provides the phonetic pronunciation sГ№ in Cantonese.
